plugins.name: vibe-check
plugins.description: Vibe-check your diff before you commit. AI-powered parallel code review for your uncommitted changes.

plugins.name: phi-compli
plugins.description: Audit a codebase for PHI exposure and HIPAA Security Rule technical-safeguard gaps, then produce a plain-language report with concrete Claude Code fixes — built for the non-engineer physician who builds and runs his own clinical tools.
